meta.title: Rank-Based MM — Masterful+ Simulation
meta.meta_line: Synthetic create→5s runs · 60s TTL · 2026-07-12 evening + full day · v1 vs v2 assists
meta.filters: ARENAS, IS_USER, pool pvpLeague≥15, focal Masterful+ (16–25)
meta.source_notebook: Rank Based MM Synthetic Runs.ipynb; Rank Based MM Synthetic Runs [Full Day Hourly].ipynb
meta.thesis: Ship Masterful+ rank MM with whale timer; add cold-start/top-10 assists — biggest lift for non-whales and off-peak hours.
meta.description: Extensive sim of proposed Masterful+ matchmaking: evening deep-dive + full-day hourly concentration, v1 vs v2.

thesis.headline: Proposed Masterful+ MM clears the queue — whale timer is the workhorse; cold-start rescues non-whales and thin hours.
thesis.recommendation: Proceed with same-rank + 0.9–1.1 + whale timed expansion; include cold-start / top-10 assists (v2). Stress-test sign-off on off-peak hours (04–06 IST), not evening peak alone.
caveats: Power bounds are aspirational end-state anchors — ~55% of today's Masterful+ tickets flag as whale.
Cold-start / top-10 marks use those same bounds, not live empirical quantiles.
Synthetic greedy pairing ≠ live MM scorer; Rank Boost / Dynamic Rep / loss-streak not in this sim.

method.pool: pvpLeague ≥ 15 (Remarkable 3 filler for M1 cold-start); stats on Masterful+ only
method.engine: Every 5s, active unmatched tickets with age < 60s form a pool; greedy 1:1 oldest-first, closest power ratio to 1.0

roadmap.title: Expired tickets deep-dive
roadmap.note: Who expires: rank, power vs bounds, hour, cold-start eligibility, search age at expiry

roadmap.title: Rank Boost / Dynamic Rep
roadmap.note: Progression layer — does not change MM pool

roadmap.title: Post-launch bound re-baseline
roadmap.note: Recompute 10% marks after population redistributes into target bounds
